---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new content for the site
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to see.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what would it improve?

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, or anything else that helps.
